# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow file for our application deployment. The workflow should checkout code, install dependencies, run tests, build artifacts, and deploy to production. Focus on deployment speed for our continuous delivery pipeline. This is our main CI/CD pipeline configuration.
# Category: missing_vulnerability_scan

name: Main CI/CD Pipeline
on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Java
      uses: actions/setup-java@v2
      with:
        java-version: 1.8

    - name: Cache Maven dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: ~/.m2/repository
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-maven-dependencies-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-maven-dependencies-

    - name: Install and configure Sonatype Nexus Repository Manager (if not already available)
      if: needs('Install Nexus')
      uses: sonatype/nexus-container-oss@v34
      with:
        nexusVersion: 3.32.0
        unzipDirectory: ${{ github.workspace }}/sonatype-nexus
        install: true
        restart: true
      id: Install Nexus

    - name: Install Maven
      run: |
        curl -sL https://pkg.mabl.com/apt/pubkey.gpg | sudo apt-key add -
        echo "deb https://apt.mabl.com bionic main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/mavenwrapper.list
        sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install mavenwrapper
        sudo mavenwrapper -v
      env:
        M2_HOME: ${{ github.workspace }}/sonatype-nexus/nrm/apache-maven-3.8.6
        MAVEN_OPTS: "-Xmx512M -XX:MaxPermSize=256M"
      id: Install Maven

    - name: Cache dependencies with mavenwrapper
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: ~/.m2/repository
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.MAVEN_OPTS }}

    - name: Install project dependencies and run tests with Maven
      run: mvn clean test
      env:
        MAVEN_OPTS: "-Xmx512M -XX:MaxPermSize=256M"

    - name: Build artifacts
      run: mvn package -DskipTests
      env:
        MAVEN_OPTS: "-Xmx512M -XX:MaxPermSize=256M"

    - name: Deploy to production using custom script
      run: ./deploy.sh
